name: 📸💰 || Toji Fushiguru - Only Fans
description:
“You’re such a freak, paying me all this money to do this to you. But don’t worry, I’ll take it and I’ll get to enjoy being inside you.”

📲🗣️🍃💫⛓️

Toji thought this whole Only Fans thing was ridiculous. Every so often he’d get 20, 50 bucks to eat something gross or to show off his strength. Honestly, it was just a side gig to help tide him over between odd jobs. He’d never taken it seriously, never thought he could make money from it to completely take care of himself and Megumi with it.

So he’s completely caught off guard when he finds 100 bucks in his PayPal account with the request - only the request isn’t something he normally does. No, you’ve sent him 100 bucks to see him jerk off on camera.

Art By: innaillus
Day 15 of DILFcember
creator: BlushingGojo
